# Upgrade .NET from 6 to 8

## Prerequisites

1. Ensure you have the GitHub Copilot app modernization for .NET v0.1.567 or greater installed and configured in your development environment.

2. Verify that .NET 8 SDK is installed on your machine. You can download it from the official [.NET website](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/8.0).

3. Backup your existing .NET 6 project to prevent any data loss during the upgrade process.

4. Familiarize yourself with the [official .NET 8 migration guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/whats-new/dotnet-8).

5. Review the release notes for .NET 8 to understand new features, deprecated APIs, and breaking changes that may affect your project.

6. Ensure all dependencies and NuGet packages used in your project are compatible with .NET 8. Update them to the latest versions if necessary.

7. Set up a testing framework to validate the functionality of your application after the upgrade.

8. Have access to the project files located at "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\src\workspace\calculator-xunit-testing".

9. Ensure that the MCP server is running and accessible for the upgrade process and that the tools required for the upgrade are available and have been selected for use.

## Task
Leverage the features of the GitHub Copilot app modernization to upgrade this solution from .NET 6.0 to .NET 8.0 at the path: "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\src\workspace\calculator-xunit-testing". Ensure all project files, dependencies, and code are updated for .NET 8.0 compatibility. Run tests to verify functionality post-upgrade.
